title: Postdoctoral Researcher for the ERC Advanced Grant InterText
department: UKP Lab, Department of Computer Science
eligibility: PhD (completed or near completion) in Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Computer Science, or a related discipline.
A strong publication record at top-tier venues.
The drive to lead an independent research line.
research_themes: AI for Science: scientific evidence synthesis, claim verification
Automated fact-checking and multimodal misinformation detection
Human-centric and agentic approaches as a complementary focus
notes: Bottom-up proposals that connect to the InterText vision are very welcome.
